resumeItems: Built dual portals for GPU cluster deployment coordination, bridging lease providers and internal teams through file sharing and task management, with upstream cluster design integrations and downstream lifecycle tracking.
Engineered a data platform enabling rapid mass onboarding of \textbf{29,000+} site operators, turning physical site constraints into actionable AI rack deployment roadmaps.
Developed event-driven features in Dynamics CRM, transforming data center lease acquisition workflows to boost transparency and slash operational costs by \textbf{75%}.
Automated credential management in service authentication by transitioning to Azure Managed Service Identity (MSI), fortifying security and minimizing maintenance overhead.
Architected containerized banking microservices with Spring Boot and Node.js on Docker and Kubernetes, enabling modular deployments adaptable to each financial institution's requirements.
Established a secure proxy server enabling encrypted client-teller collaboration for \textbf{600+} branches and \textbf{1000+} tellers, ensuring seamless operations.

Replaced \textbf{60-second} HTTP polling with real-time WebSocket data streaming, cutting data refresh latency to \textbf{<100ms} and enabling critical operations like secure money transfers and interbranch cash shipments.
Migrated \textbf{6} services to OpenTelemetry SDK, modernizing legacy observability to enable distributed tracing, metrics collection, and up-to-date security compliance.

Eliminated manual data entry in data center lease execution workflows by building event-driven Service Bus upstream integrations, reducing end-to-end processing from \textbf{1,800 to 900} hours annually.

Built an offline-first MERN wildlife and environmental data collection application for \textbf{50+} field researchers in low-connectivity environments, syncing locally-stored records to MongoDB upon reconnection.

Designed a role-based admin dashboard replacing Excel workflows, giving administrators centralized visibility into wildlife observations, measurements, and environmental records across all field teams.
\textbf{Languages}: C# (.NET), TypeScript (Node, Next), Python, C, Java (Spring Boot), SQL, Shell Script.
\textbf{Backend}: Distributed Systems Architecture, SOLID Principles, Database Design & Scale, OIDC, RBAC, JWT.
\textbf{Tools and Frameworks}: Event-Driven (Kafka, Azure Service Bus), Firebase, Power Platform, MCP, WebSockets.
\textbf{DevOps and Cloud}: CI/CD Pipelines (Jenkins, ADO, GH Actions), IaC (Bicep, ARM), Kubernetes, Azure, GCP.

subheadings.techstack: React, NodeJS, PSQL, Firebase, Socket.io, Redis
resumeItems: Empowered \textbf{50+} architects to collaborate on PlantUML diagrams in real-time via a WebSocket-powered solution.
Designed a Redis write-buffer layer to absorb concurrent diagram edits during live sessions, flushing persisted state to PostgreSQL and preventing write contention under simultaneous collaboration.
Scoped diagram room access to creators and invited members using Firebase Authentication, enforcing private collaboration boundaries at the session level.

subheadings.position: Bachelor of Computing, Honors Co-op Major Software Engineering Minor Marketing
